Technique Work it with a jerk-sink-jerk cadence; keep the line slightly slack between twitches so the bait moves unpredictably, and vary the pause length.

Technique Bump bottom with short strips and let the fly tick along rocks; keep tension so you feel every stop against structure.

Technique Bang it directly into wood, rock, or stumps so the squared bill deflects the bait sideways — reaction strikes happen on that ricochet.
